description: Create Terraform modules under infra/terraform/ for AWS infrastructure: VPC, EKS, RDS, ElastiCache, S3, CloudFront, and Monitoring. Plus staging and production environment compositions.
steps: Create infra/terraform/modules/vpc/main.tf - 3-AZ VPC with public/private/isolated subnets, NAT gateway, Internet Gateway, route tables, flow logs. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.
Create infra/terraform/modules/eks/main.tf - EKS cluster with managed node groups, OIDC provider, Karpenter provisioner support, cluster autoscaler IAM. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.

Create infra/terraform/modules/rds/main.tf - PostgreSQL RDS Multi-AZ with pgvector extension, automated backups, encryption at rest (KMS), parameter group, subnet group. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.
Create infra/terraform/modules/elasticache/main.tf - Redis cluster mode with encryption in transit/at rest, subnet group, auth token. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.
Create infra/terraform/modules/s3/main.tf - Per-app buckets with lifecycle rules, versioning, server-side encryption, CORS configuration, block public access. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.
Create infra/terraform/modules/cloudfront/main.tf - CDN distributions with OAI (Origin Access Identity), custom domain support, TLS certificate, cache behaviors. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.
Create infra/terraform/modules/monitoring/main.tf - CloudWatch log groups, metric alarms (CPU, memory, 5xx), dashboard definitions, SNS topics for alerts. Include variables.tf and outputs.tf.
Create infra/terraform/environments/production/main.tf - Production composition calling all modules with production-grade settings (multi-AZ, larger instances, strict security).
Create infra/terraform/environments/staging/main.tf - Staging composition with smaller instances, same architecture but cost-optimized.
Create infra/terraform/versions.tf with required providers (AWS, Kubernetes, Helm).
acceptance_criteria: All terraform module directories exist with main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf
HCL syntax is valid (proper block structure, no syntax errors)
VPC module creates 3-AZ subnets (public, private, isolated)
EKS module supports managed node groups and Karpenter
RDS module has Multi-AZ, encryption, and automated backups
ElastiCache module has cluster mode and encryption
S3 module creates per-service buckets with lifecycle rules
CloudFront module has OAI and TLS
Monitoring module has CloudWatch alarms and dashboards
Production environment uses all modules with production settings
Staging environment uses all modules with cost-optimized settings
verification: Check that all .tf files exist and have valid HCL block structure
Run pnpm turbo build to ensure no existing code was broken
